mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM categories
ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM categories WHERE user_id IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL AND is_active = TRUE ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM categories WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM categories WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND code = #{code} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO categories (user_id, code, name, icon, color, type, sort_order, is_system, is_active) VALUES (#{userId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{icon}, #{color}, #{type}, #{sortOrder}, #{isSystem}, #{isActive})
mapper.update:
UPDATE categories
name = #{name}, icon = #{icon}, color = #{color}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE categories SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
